ItacPersonItem.Notes: On Zoppino and his work in the panorama of 16th c. Italy, see Luigi Severi, Sitibondo nello stampar de` libri. Niccolo` Zoppino tra libro e volgare, letteratura cortigiana e questione della lingua, Manziana, 2009
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
